mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NEWS (title, stock_id, stock_code, news_url, published_date, name) VALUES (#{title}, #{stockId}, #{stockCode}, #{newsUrl}, #{publishedDate}, #{name})
mapper.select: SELECT news_id, title, stock_id, stock_code, news_code, news_title, news_url, published_date, created_at, name FROM NEWS WHERE news_id = #{newsId}
SELECT news_id, title, stock_code, news_url, published_date, name FROM NEWS ORDER BY published_date DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT news_id, title, stock_code, news_url, published_date, name FROM NEWS ORDER BY published_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT news_id, title, stock_code, news_url, published_date, name FROM NEWS ORDER BY published_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT news_id, title, stock_code, news_url, published_date, name FROM NEWS WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR news_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY published_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NEWS WHERE DATE(published_date) = CURDATE()
